targets.expr: idrac_storage_drive_capacity_bytes * on(instance) group_left(hostname) idrac_system_machine_info{hostname="$server_name"}  * on(id,instance) group_right(hostname) idrac_storage_drive_info
idrac_memory_module_capacity_bytes * on(instance) group_left(hostname) idrac_system_machine_info{hostname="$server_name"}  * on(id,instance) group_right(hostname) idrac_memory_module_info
idrac_storage_controller_health * on(instance) group_left(hostname) idrac_system_machine_info{hostname="$server_name"}  * on(id,instance) group_right(hostname) idrac_storage_controller_info
